title: Remove GoJS Developer Message in Production
description:
## Bug
The GoJS developer/evaluation message is displayed in the production environment despite having a full license.

## Fix
Apply the production GoJS license key to remove the developer message from the production deployment.
acceptance_criteria: GoJS developer message is not displayed in production
Production license key is properly applied
ux_changes: Removed GoJS developer/evaluation message from the production application.
implementation_notes: Recurring GoJS license key issue. Production key applied to remove the developer message.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue on production and confirmed the message is removed.
